Bin the mutation frequency

Source: R/airr.R
bin_mu_freq.Rd

Bins the mu_freq column in a Seurat object into specified categories (e.g. 0%, 0-1%, 1-5%, etc.) for easier visualization and analysis. The function creates new columns with binned mutation frequencies based on the provided number of bins.

Usage

bin_mu_freq(seurat_obj, num_bins = c(2, 3, 5))

Arguments

seurat_obj

The Seurat object.

num_bins

The number of bins to split mu_freq into. Must be at least one of 2, 3, or 5.

Value

The provided Seurat object with a new binned mu_freq column.

Details

The bins are (most likely) not going to be equal sizes.
